channel.title: Job on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Job on Nature Works

item.title: Legal frameworks for Biodiversity Assistant role
item.description:
I have just started part-time work as a Biodiversity Assistant for Ceredigion County Council, and these legal frameworks are here for reference

Yesterday I started work as a Biodiversity Assistant for Ceredigion Local Nature Partnership working at Ceredigion County Council. http://localhost:1313/blog/240306-job/
